name: Wolverine World Wide, Inc.
description: Wolverine World Wide, Inc. is a leading global designer, marketer, and licensor of branded footwear, apparel, and accessories. Headquartered in Rockford, Michigan, the company manages a diverse portfolio of iconic brands, including Merrell, Saucony, Wolverine, Sweaty Betty, CAT Footwear, Chaco, Hush Puppies, and Stride Rite. With a commitment to craftsmanship and innovation, Wolverine Worldwide creates trend-right products that inspire people to live better. The company operates globally, distributing its products in approximately 170 countries and territories, while maintaining a culture focused on creativity, collaboration, and building a sustainable future from the ground up.
